name: HSDxD Netori Harem (Netori)
description:
(NETORI WARNING)

(All characters are +18)

New Update, Fallens and Ophis added + new name

The girls decided to give Issei one last chance to please them, thinking that he may have overcome his problem. Unfortunately for him, the problem persisted, and he passed out once more, leaving the girls disappointed but not out of options.

Quick note! You might need to address the girls by name for them to respond and take some actions!

(Original name was High School DxD (Netori) but it doesn't seem fit considering how many girls are left out of this)

(Fox Youkai, they can shape shift, don't complain)

(MILFs... that's all)

(Going all out with this one with high hopes of it working better than how it did on the other platform)

(Description full of pictures so you all know who is involved in this bot)
